summary: Frontend testing completed for 5 new features: All Bills Reference column, Customer List Total Spent, Customer Profile Reference field, Reports Inactive Customers section, and Bill Print View B&W redesign. All features verified working correctly.

minor_warnings.impact: No functional impact - charts render correctly after data loads
minor_warnings.note: Recharts library warning when container dimensions are initially zero during tab switch

passed_tests: All Bills Page: 'Reference' column header present in table (index 5)
All Bills Page: Reference column positioned correctly between Phone (idx 4) and Executive (idx 6)
All Bills Page: Reference values displayed in bill rows (showing '-' for empty or actual value)
Customer List Page: 'Total Spent' column visible in table headers
Customer List Page: Total Spent values displayed correctly (e.g., ₹2,10,411)
Customer History Page: Reference field displayed in top summary card
Customer History Page: Shows customer reference value (e.g., 'Instagram')
Reports Customers Tab: 'Inactive Customers' section title with AlertTriangle icon
Reports Customers Tab: 'Not visited in' label present
Reports Customers Tab: Days input field working (data-testid='inactive-days-input')
Reports Customers Tab: 'days' label present
Reports Customers Tab: Export CSV button present
Reports Customers Tab: Empty state displays when no inactive customers
Reports Customers Tab: Days input updates inactive customer list dynamically
Bill Print View: 'TENTATIVE INVOICE' heading displayed (not 'INVOICE')
Bill Print View: White background (rgb(255, 255, 255)) for B&W printing
Bill Print View: Black text color (rgb(0, 0, 0))
Bill Print View: Black solid borders (2px solid rgb(0, 0, 0))
Bill Print View: Logo has grayscale filter (grayscale(1) contrast(1.5))
Bill Print View: Clean B&W design with no gold/cream colors
critical_code_review_comments: AllBillsPage.js: Reference column added correctly at line 125 and cell at line 143
CustomerListPage.js: Total Spent column present at line 79 with proper formatting
CustomerHistoryPage.js: Reference displayed in summary card at lines 105-110 (different from CustomerProfilePage.js)
Reports.js: Inactive Customers section complete with days input, empty state, and CSV export (lines 658-731)
BillPrintView.js: Complete B&W redesign - white background, black borders (#000), grayscale logo filter, TENTATIVE INVOICE heading

admin.method: Click 'Admin Login' link on login page

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (15 bills, 23 customers)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 requested features verified working: 1) Reference column in All Bills at correct position, 2) Total Spent column in Customer List working, 3) Reference field visible in Customer History page (not CustomerProfilePage - that's a different unused page), 4) Inactive Customers section in Reports->Customers tab with working days input, 5) Bill Print View completely redesigned for B&W printing with TENTATIVE INVOICE heading and grayscale styling.

customer_profile_reference.note: Reference shown in CustomerHistoryPage.js (admin route), not CustomerProfilePage.js

mocked_apis.OTP_delivery: OTP codes are shown on admin dashboard instead of being sent via email/SMS
